title: antirrhinum majus subvar. verticillatum
intro: Antirrhinum majus subvar. verticillatum, commonly known as the vertical snapdragon or dragon flower, is a plant species that belongs to the snapdragon family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce fever, treat coughs and respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus subvar. verticillatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, colds, and influenza, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and coughs. Antirrhinum majus subvar. verticillatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
